## What's Changed

- Added server-side music library endpoints for Tater Tube Player's Tape Deck module.
- Local media categories now support Music libraries alongside Movies, TV, and folder browsing.
- Audio files can be served from Local media for Tape Deck playback.
- Reworked the dashboard so Tater Tube Players and Active Streams are the first thing shown.
- Moved the dashboard summary blocks to the bottom and cleaned up the stat card styling.
- Updated the sidebar to show compact hardware transcoding status and a cleaner version label.
- Removed the GitHub footer links from the sidebar.
- Removed Category from the visible Queue list so long category names no longer crowd the table.
- Updated README and sample config docs for Music local media.

## Upgrade

Pull the latest container and restart:

```bash
docker pull ghcr.io/tatertotterson/tater-tube-server:latest
docker restart tater-tube-server
```

Keep your existing `/config`, media folder, cache, and hardware device mappings. Add Music folders under Local Media if you want Tape Deck to use the server as its provider.
